about: Identity platform for K-12 education, used by schools to give students and staff secure single sign-on access to digital learning applications; owned by Kahoot!.
mission_values: Mission is to connect every student to a world of learning. Stated values include diversity, inclusion, and belonging -- building diverse teams and creating safe spaces for everyone to bring their authentic selves to work.

about: Enterprise learning system for workforce transformation that brings together courses, videos, articles, projects, and skill insights matched to individual roles, skills, and goals; named to Fast Company's World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026 for its AI-driven approach to closing the human readiness gap.
mission_values: Mission is to discover, empower, and celebrate the next generation of global expertise, believing learning is the key to unlocking opportunity. Stated values: Diversity & Inclusion, Growth Mindset, and Collaboration.
